title: Purple Dao Sect
content:
Purple Dao Sect
 is one of the top sects in the 
Rank 5 Region
 of the 
Cloud Sea Star System
.

Background
[
]

Over 3,000 years ago, Purple Dao Sect was a minor sect in the Rank 5 Region but today its one of the strongest sects there. This was all done due to the efforts of  
Lu Yuncong
.

History
[
]

Two elders and over a hundred disciples of Purple Dao Sect invaded the 
Alliance Star System
 while it was warring with the 
Allheaven Star System
. They managed to lure over two dozen of Wang Lin's mosquito beasts into a trap but they were killed by a fuming 
Wang Lin
, soon after.

Rudy
, the young master of Purple Dao Sect, invaded the Origin Sect soon after its Ancestor passed away. He did so in an attempt to kidnap 
Lu Yanfei
 and use her as his cultivation furnace. However, he, along with his attendant, 
Song Wude
, were killed by Wang Lin.
